semantic_description: The function performs lower_bound binary search over a sorted integer array segment a[0..n). It returns an index between 0 and n such that every element before the index is strictly less than target, and either the index is n or the element at the index is at least target. The control structure is a while loop maintaining a shrinking half-open search interval [left, right). The empty array case and exhausted search return 0 or n as appropriate. The function only reads the input array and preserves the IntArray::full ownership unchanged.
